meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.14 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] The numbered input-typist note ［＃入力者注(N)］ (ASCII parens + digits; 32 corpus occurrences) yields an annotation of editorial kind editor-note, rendered as a visible 注N superscript (<sup class="aozora-editor-note">注N</sup>) rather than a hidden span. Serialization is byte-exact. The whole body must match exactly: a compound note that merely cites the phrase (底本では…。入力者注(6)) stays a textual divergence note (asIs/textualNote).
